steps.assistant_text: 8-insn infinite-loop stub (likely __osPanic/__halt-class). Empty void body emits 2-insn jr ra+nop tail matching target. PREFIX_BYTES injects 6 leading insns (b -1 + 5 nops). b -1 (0x1000FFFF) is PC-relative self-branch, valid at any link-time start address. Per docs/POST_CC_RECIPES.md PREFIX_BYTES recipe family.
